description: Polish, extras, and final integration: notifications/reminders, study streaks, statistics dashboard, global search, Supabase schema SQL file, and final build verification.
steps: Create src/components/common/GlobalSearch.tsx - Command palette (Cmd+K / Ctrl+K) that searches across all data: tasks, daily logs, exams, tracker entries, revision items. Uses shadcn Command component. Shows results grouped by type with navigation.

Create src/components/stats/StatsPanel.tsx - Statistics overview: total study hours this week, tasks completed this week, revision items reviewed, current study streak (consecutive days with logged activity), subject-wise time distribution bar chart, completion rate percentage.

Implement study streak system in useSettingsStore.ts - Track consecutive days with any activity (daily log, task completion, study session, revision). Show streak count on dashboard. Fire confetti animation on milestone streaks (7, 14, 30 days).

Create src/components/common/NotificationBanner.tsx - In-app notification banners: (1) 'You have X tasks due tonight' on page load, (2) 'Exam in X days - activate study mode?' prompt, (3) 'Revision items pending' reminder, (4) 'Great streak! X days!' celebration.

Create database/schema.sql - Complete Supabase/Postgres schema with all tables, RLS policies, indexes. Tables: users, subjects, papers, topics, tasks, tags, task_tags, columns, daily_logs, tracker_entries (with type enum), revision_schedules, exams, exam_subjects, routines, settings. Include comments explaining each table. This is for future backend integration.
Create database/seed.sql - SQL seed data matching the localStorage seed: 7 subjects with papers, default columns, default tags.

Final integration pass: ensure all pages link correctly, navigation works on all routes, dark mode applies globally, accent colors propagate, mobile responsive on all pages, no console errors in build.
Add loading states and empty states to all pages - when no data exists, show helpful onboarding text explaining what the section does and a CTA to add first item.
Create src/components/common/UndoToast.tsx - Reusable undo toast component used by soft delete across all entities. Shows for 5 seconds with progress bar animation.
Verify the final build: run npm run build, ensure dist/ is produced, ensure no TypeScript errors, ensure all imports resolve
acceptance_criteria: Global search (Cmd+K) opens command palette and finds items across all data types
Stats panel shows study hours, completion rates, streak count
Study streak tracks consecutive active days and shows on dashboard
Notification banners appear for due tasks, upcoming exams, and pending revisions
database/schema.sql contains complete Postgres schema with all tables and RLS
All pages have proper empty states with onboarding guidance
Undo toast appears on all delete actions with 5-second countdown
npm run build succeeds with zero errors
